entries.text:
Verses 1-7

CHAPTER 18

When Israel Will be Brought Back

1. The land beyond the rivers of Ethiopia (Isaiah 18:1) 2. The ambassadors sent (Isaiah 18:2) 3. The trumpet blown and Jehovah’s Message (Isaiah 18:3-6) 4. Israel restored to Mount Zion (Isaiah 18:7)An interesting prophecy concerning a nation of great power, which will be used in the bringing back of God’s ancient people.
